description: CompositionBlue and green printed off-white kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a split neckline and a buttoned placket with crystal buttons, has three quarter sleeves, pin-tucks on the yoke and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium to hot ironThere's a bright, gypsy style fabric pattern trending in fashion circuits at the moment which is already selling like hot cakes on myntra - so you'll stay in trend when you wear this biba kurta. Fashioned to please your colour fetish, this piece can be styled with colourful capris or conservative leggings. Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
